summary: Comprehensive testing of Turkish Gallery CRM critical business logic fixes. All features working correctly: Sale flow, deposit flow, transaction cancel/delete with status revert, promo card expertise diagram visibility, and double-sale prevention.
passed_tests: BMW 320i visible in Stok Araçlar with 'Stokta' status - SUCCESS
Vehicle menu shows 'Satış Yap' and 'Kapora Al' options for Stokta cars - SUCCESS
Sale flow: Clicking 'Satış Yap' opens sale modal, entering price 600000, confirming sale - SUCCESS
Car status changes to 'Satıldı' after sale - SUCCESS
Sold car moves to 'Satılan Araçlar' page - SUCCESS
Sold cars in 'Satılan Araçlar' view do NOT show action menu (showActions=false) - SUCCESS
Sale transaction appears in 'Gelir & Gider' (Finance page) with correct amount - SUCCESS
Transaction cancel (RotateCcw icon) soft-deletes transaction and reverts car status to 'Stokta' - SUCCESS
Promo Card modal opens via 'TANITIM KARTI' button - SUCCESS
Expertise diagram visible on white background in Promo Card with ORJ/BOY/DEĞ labels - SUCCESS
Deposit flow: 'Kapora Al' opens modal, entering 50000 TL, saving deposit - SUCCESS
Car status changes to 'Kapora Alındı' after deposit - SUCCESS
Vehicle menu shows 'Satış Tamamla' and 'Kapora Düzenle' for deposited cars - SUCCESS
Deposit transaction appears in Finance page - SUCCESS
Permanent delete (Trash icon) removes transaction completely - SUCCESS
Double-sale prevention: Frontend guard checks if car.status === 'Satıldı' before allowing sale - SUCCESS

test_classes: TestSaleRevertFlow (7 tests) - Sale and revert flow
TestDepositFlow (3 tests) - Deposit and cancel flow

prevent_double_sale.implementation: Frontend guard in SaleModal.jsx (line 62-65, 86, 104-108) and App.js (line 171-175)
prevent_double_sale.behavior: When car.status === 'Satıldı', shows alert 'Bu araç zaten satılmış!' and prevents sale

transaction_cancel_revert_status.behavior: Canceling sale transaction reverts car status from 'Satıldı' to 'Stokta' (or 'Kapora Alındı' if deposit exists)

promo_card_expertise_diagram.behavior: SVG diagram with colored rectangles (green=orijinal, yellow=boyali, red=degisen, blue=lokal) visible on white background

seed_data_creation: None - used existing BMW 320i test car
context_for_next_testing_agent: All critical business logic fixes verified: 1) Double-sale prevention works via frontend check in SaleModal.jsx 2) Transaction cancel reverts car status via revertTransactionEffect in FinancePage.jsx 3) Permanent delete removes records completely 4) Promo card expertise diagram visible with pastel colors on white background 5) VehicleCard conditionally shows menu items based on car status. The car should be in 'Stokta' status after tests complete.
